tasks.instruction: Uzupełnij poniższe wypowiedzi (1.1.–1.6.), wybierając spośród podanych możliwości. Zakreśl literę A, B albo C.

items.prompt: He started his own business from _______ with almost no money and became very successful.
She's always burning the midnight _______ to get her reports finished on time.
The company decided to _______ corners to cut costs, but the product quality suffered.
He got the job because he knew someone on the inside. It really pays to know the right _______ .
The new project is really taking _______ — we've already signed three major clients.
Money doesn't grow on _______, you know. We have to be careful how we spend it.
